mission_class: Conceptual hypersonic surveillance and systems-pathfinder demonstrator

airframe.planform: Blended wing body with waverider wedge integration

subsystems.flight_sciences: 2D point-mass dynamics with hypersonic aero/heating model
subsystems.thermal_protection: Carbon-carbon / TPS concept with 2.5 MW/m^2 conceptual limit
subsystems.mission_software: FastAPI webapp plus CLI simulation and plotting

notes: No CFD or structural FEM in repository
Claims must be labeled model-predicted unless validated by test evidence
